subcategory: 3D animated hero with Three.js physics simulation
use_cases: Landing page hero sections for creative agencies or event sites
Interactive portfolio or personal website hero areas
Product launch landing pages requiring immersive 3D visuals
Entertainment or gaming platform entry points
ai_summary: A 3D animated hero component built with Three.js featuring physics-simulated spheres, mouse-controlled camera rotation, and interactive hover effects. The component creates an immersive, festive atmosphere with shadows and transparent rendering. Best suited for creative landing pages, event sites, or any project requiring engaging 3D hero sections.
